description: Bifolio of Hebrew piyyuṭ. On the righthand page of recto there are circled accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. Mentions savin (abhul), sandarac (sandarūs), alum (shabb), rock salt (milḥ darānī), cassia (dār ṣīnī), spikenard (nārdīn), and various other items
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
